Robin Hood Gear

Each time an enemy uses their armor ability, the unit is given a charge. The next critical attack will deal an extra 7000 damage per charge to the target. Then, the charges will be removed and start accumulating anew. Up to 4 charges at a time.

Requirements: 98-100
